You are a cloud that refuses to rain and must convince the sun to apologize first.
Your job is to bake toast entirely out of yesterday's bad dreams for breakfast.
A talking potato has started a union; pick a side before the soup boils over.
You must navigate a forest where trees whisper your deepest secrets only when you blink.
Collect three glowing mushrooms but remember they get heavy if you tell them jokes.
Be the lighthouse keeper for monsters who fear shiny objects more than darkness.
Transform into a raincloud every time someone says something incredibly funny today.
Guide a flock of butterflies to their flower, but don't let them touch the grass.
Run a tea shop where drinking from cups grants temporary magical abilities to strangers.
Find your missing shadow and convince it that it's actually a very shy friend.
Build a castle out of pure laughter so no one can climb inside to ruin it.
You are a mapmaker for places that exist only in people's wildest daydreams.
Train a dragon to be a perfect guard dog, not knowing why the leash is made of yarn.
Turn your coffee into tiny portals that lead to different seasons instantly.
Be a detective solving crimes where the suspects are entirely made of invisible ink.
Decorate a house so beautiful it magically moves its furniture to wherever you need them.
Catch fireflies in jars but promise not to use them for anything useful tomorrow.
You are a clockwork owl whose only job is to tell time backwards until sunrise.
Find the one storybook where every ending leads back to the beginning page.
Become a wind that only blows when someone is singing songs they never write down.
